title: Edinburgh Previews Rob Auton And Huge Davies
description: Join us for an evening of the freshest comedy as comedians Huge Davies (8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown, Richard Osman’s House of Games) and Rob Auton (The Russell Howard Hour) test out brand-new material in their quest to build an hour(ish)-long show each. This is your chance to catch familiar favourites and rising stars at their most daring. Come along, have a laugh, and find the funny together!

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
